stanzas:
Song: Eppa maama treatu

Lyrics:Viveka
Movie: Jilla
Music : D Imman

Eppa maama maama treatu?
enna maama maama treatu?
Naanum enna marakka
neeyum vinnil parappa
indha treatu thaaney rootu.

Eppa maama maama treatu?
enna maama maama treatu?
Enna moodil irakku
passwordu tharren unnaku
va inbam ellaam kaatu

Jilla-oda treatu eppavumey hot-u
aasaikku illa gate-u, vaangikodi kettu.
sachinaa bat-u, Janaki-na paatu
shivaji-na act-u, jilla naale treat-u.
innoruthaba...

Eppa maama maama treatu?
enna maama maama treatu?
ayyo surprise edhukku
quickaa sollu ennaku
increase aachu heart-u beat-u

Eppa maama maama treatu?
enna maama maama treatu?
un simple hug-ule
un simple kiss-ula
naan aaven appa flat-u

Jilla-oda treatu eppavumey hot-u
aasaikku illa gate-u, vaangikodi kettu.
sachinaa bat-u, Janaki-na paatu
shivaji-na act-u, jilla naale treat-u.
innoruthaba...

Hey boy listen,
take your time and tell me
where you wanna go ..
Yaaraa iva..

I come a ringon
I come a ring on
if you ready to rock this party.

Idhu vera maari treat-u
konjam freeya vaiyu date-u
nalla nondi ketaalum
solla solla maaten di
maaman romba romba smart-u
venaa paaru maiyya pottu

Jilla-oda treatu eppavumey hot-u
aasaikku illa gate-u, vaangikodi kettu.
sachinaa bat-u, Janaki-na paatu
shivaji-na act-u, jilla naale treat-u.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Eppa Maama Treatu'?

The song 'Eppa Maama Treatu' conveys a playful and festive vibe, asking about the celebration and the joy it brings.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Jilla'?

This song is a lively number that enhances the celebratory moments in Jilla, reflecting the joyous spirit of the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the voices of AV Pooja, D Imman, and Snigdha Shandra, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Eppa Maama Treatu' released?

'Eppa Maama Treatu' was released on December 17, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Eppa Maama Treatu' from the movie Jilla is a lively and upbeat track that brings a sense of joy and celebration. It showcases the playful interactions among characters, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The energetic performances by the singers and the catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of celebration, making it a favorite among party-goers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Eppa Maama Treatu from Jilla is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the festive spirit of celebration. With the dynamic collaboration of AV Pooja, D Imman, and Snigdha Shandra, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. The catchy lyrics by Viveka add to the fun, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: When will you treat me, uncle? What will you treat me, uncle? I too won't forget, you too will spread this treat in the sky.
When will you treat me, uncle? What will you treat me, uncle? I will give you the password that is in my mood, it will show you all the happiness.
The treat from Jilla is always hot, there is no gate for desire, just take it. The Sachin bat, Janaki's song, Shivaji's act, treat from Jilla tomorrow. Another one...
When will you treat me, uncle? What will you treat me, uncle? Oh, why the surprise, tell me quickly, my heart's beat has increased.
When will you treat me, uncle? What will you treat me, uncle? In your simple hug and your simple kiss, I become flat, dad.
The treat from Jilla is always hot, there is no gate for desire, just take it. The Sachin bat, Janaki's song, Shivaji's act, treat from Jilla tomorrow. Another one...
Hey boy listen, take your time and tell me where you wanna go.. Who are they..
I come a ring on, I come a ring on if you are ready to rock this party.
This is a different kind of treat, let's keep it free for a date, even if you ask nicely, I won't say it. Uncle is very, very smart, look at him, he is putting on a show.
The treat from Jilla is always hot, there is no gate for desire, just take it. The Sachin bat, Janaki's song, Shivaji's act, treat from Jilla tomorrow.
When will you treat me, uncle?
